text:
(4) The idea of credit by organization: rely on the advantages of
                                                                                                                        governmental organizations, use the basic role of government
                                                                                                                        credit, improve linkage with fiscal financing, and promote the
                                                                                                                        healthy business, healthy finance, and healthy coordinated eco-
                                                                                                                        nomic development. Development-oriented finance adheres to
                                                                                                                        combine their own financial advantage with the advantage of
                                                                                                                        government organizations, combines the nature of quasi-debt
                                                                                                                        funds with financial assets management, improves the develop-
                                                                                                                        ment of financing mechanisms, promotes government, business,
                                                                                                                        and market mechanisms to be combined into the main body of
                                                                                                                        credit and financing platform so as to transfer the state credit,
